entry.title: Bill 76 (Hawaiʻi County): Passed Second Reading → —
entry.content:
AMENDS ORDINANCE NO. 25-45, AS AMENDED, THE OPERATING BUDGET FOR THE COUNTY OF HAWAIʻI FOR THE FISCAL YEAR ENDING JUNE 30, 2026

Appropriates revenues in the Hawaiʻi Community Foundation – Financial Empowerment Services (Private) account ($125,000)

Status: Passed Second Reading → —

Latest action: On agenda 2025-10-08

View on the council site

Status: — → Passed Second Reading

Latest action: Council: Bill 76 passes second & final reading - 10/8/25
